headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Danaher, Lowers Price Target to $230
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Danaher (NYSE:DHR) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $232 to $230.
